title: ORR: workforce management information, February 2026
text:
The Office of Rail and Road (
ORR
) publishes details about staff numbers and payroll costs for payroll and non-payroll staff on a monthly basis.

ORR's headcount and payroll data for February 2026

https://www.orr.gov.uk/sites/default/files/2026-03/workforce-data-february-2026.csv
description: Reports on departmental staff numbers and costs.
